hypothesis: Conditioning LoQI on the protein pocket environment (e.g., local pocket atom coordinates or distance restraints) will enable it to generate ligand conformations that, without additional docking or optimization, reproduce crystallographic bound poses with a median heavy-atom RMSD ≤ 1.0 Å and a median DFT-validated energy difference ≤ 1.5 kcal·mol−1 using at most five generated samples per ligand on the Platinum Diverse dataset.
